summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. USDC/USDT/DAI completed in 272ms total (vs 120s limit). USDT returns real market price via chainlink feed (source != 'stable usd'), confirming both ypricemagic changes are reflected and cache is not stale. MIC cold-start issue acknowledged as known, not a failure.
